title.ko: 하나의 반송파로부터 타반송파에의 복조 또는 변조의 변환(메이저(masers), 레이저(laser) H01S : 변조기 및 복조기로 동작하는 회로 H03C, 예. 평형 변조기 H03C 1/54; 변조기 및 주파수변환기에의 적용 세부 H03C; 지속-변수 신호로 변조된 펄스를 복조하는 것 H03K 9/00; 펄스변조 형식의 변환 H03K 11/00; 중계 시스템, 예. 중계기 H04B 7/14; 디지털 변조전송시스템에 적합한 복조기 H04L 27/00; 컬러 텔레비전에 적합한 동기 복조기 H04N 9/66)
title.en: DEMODULATION OR TRANSFERENCE OF MODULATION FROM ONE CARRIER TO ANOTHER (masers, lasers H01S;circuits capable of acting both as modulator and demodulator H03C, e.g. balanced modulators H03C0001540000;details applicable to both modulators and frequency-changers H03C;demodulating pulses which have been modulated with a continuously-variable signal H03K0009000000;transforming types of pulse modulation H03K0011000000;relay systems, e.g. repeater stations H04B0007140000;demodulators adapted for digitally modulated-carrier systems H04L0027000000;synchronous demodulators adapted for colour television H04N0009660000)

definition.ko: 복조 진폭; 각도; 결합; 초 재생 H03D1/00; H03D3/00; H03D5/00, H03D9/00; H03D11/00 전이 H03D7/00, H03D9/00 위상 또는 주파수 비교 H03D13/00 이 서브클래스의 다른 그룹에 분류되지 않은 주제사항 H03D99/00

title.ko: 진폭-변조 진동의 복조 (H03D5/00, H03D9/00, H03D11/00이 우선; 디지털 변조 반송파 시스템에 적합한 진폭 복조기, 예. 온-오프 키잉, 단측파대 또는 잔류 측파대 변조 사용 H04L27/06)
title.en: Demodulation of amplitude-modulated oscillations (H03D0005000000, H03D0009000000, H03D0011000000 take precedence;amplitude demodulators adapted for digitally modulated carrier systems, e.g. using on-off keying, single sideband or vestigial sideband modulation H04L0027060000)
Details
Modifications of demodulators to reduce interference by undesired signals
Modifications of demodulators to reduce distortion, e.g. by negative feedback

title.ko: 비선형 2극 소자에 의한 것 (H03D1/22, H03D1/26, H03D1/28이 우선)
title.en: by means of non-linear two-pole elements (H03D0001220000, H03D0001260000, H03D0001280000 take precedence)
of diodes
with provision for equalising AC and DC loads

title.ko: 3이상의 단자가 있는 비선형 소자에 의한 것(H03D 1/22, H03D 1/26, H03D 1/28이 우선)
title.en: by means of non-linear elements having more than two poles (H03D0001220000, H03D0001260000, H03D0001280000 take precedence)
of discharge tubes
of semiconductor devices
with provision for preventing undesired type of demodulation, e.g. preventing anode detection in a grid detection circuit
Homodyne or synchrodyne circuits
for demodulation of signals wherein one sideband or the carrier has been wholly or partially suppressed
by means of transit-time tubes

title.ko: 전자관 내에 전자빔의 편향에 의한 것(H03D 1/26이 우선)
title.en: by deflecting an electron beam in a discharge tube (H03D0001260000 takes precedence)

title.ko: 각도 변조된 진동의 복조(H03D 5/00, H03D 9/00, H03D 11/00 우선; 디지털 변조된 전송 시스템에 적합한 주파수 복조기, 즉. 주파수 편이 방식을 사용하는 것 H04L27/14; 디지털 변조된 전송 시스템에 적합한 위상 복조기, 즉. 위상 편이 방식을 사용하는 것 H04L 27/22)
title.en: Demodulation of angle-modulated oscillations (H03D0005000000, H03D0009000000, H03D0011000000 take precedence;frequency demodulators adapted for digitally modulated carrier systems, i.e. using frequency shift keying H04L0027140000;phase demodulators adapted for digitally modulated carrier systems, i.e. using phase shift keying H04L0027220000)

title.ko: 입력 신호로부터 얻어진 2개의 신호간의 위상차의 검파에 의한 것(H03D 3/28에서 H03D 3/32 우선)
title.en: by detecting phase difference between two signals obtained from input signal (H03D0003280000-H03D0003320000 take precedence)
by counting or integrating cycles of oscillations
by combining signals additively or in product demodulators
by means of diodes, e.g. Foster-Seeley discriminator
in which the diodes are simultaneously conducting during the same half period of the signal, e.g. ratio detector
by means of discharge tubes having more than two electrodes
by means of semiconductor devices having more than two electrodes
by means of electromechanical resonators
by means of synchronous gating arrangements
producing pulses whose amplitude or duration depends on the phase difference

by means of active elements with more than two electrodes to which two signals are applied derived from the signal to be demodulated and having a phase difference related to the frequency deviation, e.g. phase detector
Modifications of demodulators to reject or remove amplitude variations by means of locked-in oscillator circuits

title.ko: 동조회로 또는 리액턴스 회로의 경사되는 진폭-주파수 특성에 의한 것(H03D 3/28～ H03D 3/32가 우선)
title.en: by means of sloping amplitude/frequency characteristic of tuned or reactive circuit (H03D0003280000-H03D0003320000 take precedence)
Modifications of demodulators to reduce effect of temperature variations
by means of transit-time tubes

title.ko: 전자관 내의 전자빔의 편향에 의한 것(H03D 3/30이 우선)
title.en: by deflecting an electron beam in a discharge tube (H03D0003300000 takes precedence)
by means of electromechanical devices (H03D0003160000 takes precedence)

title.ko: 임의로 진폭변조 또는 각도변조된 진동을 복조하기 위한 회로(H03D 9/00, H03D 11/00 우선; 진폭 및 각도 변조의 조합에 의해 특정되는 디지털 변조 전송 시스템에 적합한 복조기, 예, QAM(quadrature amplitude modulation) H04L 27/38)
title.en: Circuits for demodulating amplitude-modulated or angle-modulated oscillations at will (H03D0009000000, H03D0011000000 take precedence;demodulators adapted for digitally modulated carrier systems characterised by combinations of amplitude and angle modulation, e.g. quadrature amplitude modulation H04L0027380000)

title.ko: 1개의 반송파로부터 타반송파에의 변조의 변화, 예. 주파수변환(H03D 9/00, H03D 11/00이 우선; 주파수변조기로서 이용된 유전체증폭기, 자기증폭기, 파라메트릭(Parametric)
title.en: Transference of modulation from one carrier to another, e.g. frequency-changing (H03D0009000000, H03D0011000000 take precedence;dielectric amplifiers, magnetic amplifiers, parametric amplifiers used as frequency-changers H03F)
by means of diodes (H03D0007140000-H03D0007220000 take precedence)
having negative resistance characteristic, e.g. tunnel diode

title.ko: 3이상의 전극이 있는 전자관에 의한 것(H03D 7/14～ H03D 7/22가 우선)
title.en: by means of discharge tubes having more than two electrodes (H03D0007140000-H03D0007220000 take precedence)
the signals to be mixed being applied between the same two electrodes
the signals to be mixed being applied between different pairs of electrodes

title.ko: 3이상의 전극이 있는 반도체 장치에 의한 것(H03D 7/14～ H03D 7/22가 우선)
title.en: by means of semiconductor devices having more than two electrodes (H03D0007140000-H03D0007220000 take precedence)
Balanced arrangements
Multiple frequency-changing (superheterodyne receivers H04B0001260000)
Modifications of frequency-changers for eliminating image frequencies
by means of transit-time tubes

title.ko: 전자관내의 전자빔을 편향에 의한 것(H03D 7/20이 우선)
title.en: by deflecting an electron beam in a discharge tube (H03D0007200000 takes precedence)

title.ko: 변조된 전자파의 복조 또는 변조의 변환(광을 복조하기 위한 부품 또는 장치, 변조된 광 또는 광주파수를 변경하기 위한 변조를 변환하는 것 G02F 2/00)
title.en: Demodulation or transference of modulation of modulated electromagnetic waves (devices or arrangements for demodulating light, transferring the modulation of modulated light or for changing the frequency of light G02F0002000000)
Demodulation using distributed inductance and capacitance, e.g. in feeder lines
for angle-modulated oscillations
Transference of modulation using distributed inductance and capacitance
Super-regenerative demodulator circuits
for amplitude-modulated oscillations
by means of semiconductor devices having more than two electrodes
for angle-modulated oscillations
by means of semiconductor devices having more than two electrodes

title.ko: 서로 독립한 두개의 진동의 위상 또는 주파수를 비교하기 위한 회로(전압 또는 전류간 또는 전압 및 전류간 위상각의 측정을 위한 배치 G01R 25/00)
title.en: Circuits for comparing the phase or frequency of two mutually-independent oscillations (arrangements for measuring phase angle between a voltage and a current or between voltages or currents G01R0025000000)
Subject matter not provided for in other groups of this subclass
